title: WorkflowSchemeUpdateRequiredMappingsRequest
description: The request payload to get the required mappings for updating a workflow scheme.

defaultWorkflowId.description: The ID of the new default workflow for this workflow scheme. Only used in global-scoped workflow schemes. If it isn't specified, is set to *Jira Workflow (jira)*.

id.description: The ID of the workflow scheme.

workflowsForIssueTypes.description: The new workflow to issue type mappings for this workflow scheme.
